languages.text: "За свою долгую жизнь я имела честь знать многих Гапраков, но вас не припомню. Должно быть, вы из младшей ветви, мил{mf|ый|ая}? В вас определенно есть суровость Суборд Шаба… Хотя эти глаза — ветвь Каливин? Нет-нет, теряю сноровку: вы, определенно, Ноблис минорис Уратли!"

traits.locale_text: "За свою долгую жизнь я имела честь знать многих Гапраков, но вас не припомню. Должно быть, вы из младшей ветви, мил{mf|ый|ая}? В вас определенно есть суровость Суборд Шаба… Хотя эти глаза — ветвь Каливин? Нет-нет, теряю сноровку: вы, определённо, Ноблис минорис Уратли!"

languages.text: "I have had the honour of knowing many Gapraks in the course of my long life, but I do not recall you. You must be of the younger branch, my dear? You most surely have the severity of Subord Shab in you. But then those eyes... Kalivin branch? No, no, I'm losing my touch — you are decidedly Noblis Minoris Uratli!"
languages.original_text: "За свою долгую жизнь я имела честь знать многих Гапраков, но вас не припомню. Должно быть, вы из младшей ветви, мил{mf|ый|ая}? В вас определенно есть суровость Суборд Шаба… Хотя эти глаза — ветвь Каливин? Нет-нет, теряю сноровку: вы, определенно, Ноблис минорис Уратли!"

traits.locale_text: "I have had the honour of knowing many Gapraks in the course of my long life, but I do not recall you. You must be of the younger branch, my dear? You most surely have the severity of Subord Shab in you. But then those eyes... Kalivin branch? No, no, I'm losing my touch — you are decidedly Noblis Minoris Uratli!"

"I have had the honour of knowing many Gapraks in the course of my long life, but I do not recall you. You must be of the younger branch, my dear? You most surely have the severity of Subord Shab in you. But then those eyes... Kalivin branch? No, no, I'm losing my touch — you are decidedly Noblis Minoris Uratli!"

"I have had the honour of knowing many Gapraks in the course of my long life, but I do not recall you. You must be of the younger branch, my dear? You most surely have the severity of Subord Shab in you. But then those eyes... Kalivin branch? No, no, I'm losing my touch — you are decidedly Noblis Minoris Uratli!"

languages.text: “在我漫长的一生中，有幸结识过许多贾帕克家的人，但我不记得有你。你一定是旁支的吧，亲爱的？你身上确实有苏伯德·沙巴那一脉的冷峻气质。可这双眼睛……卡利文一脉的？不对，不对，我真是老糊涂了，你分明就是小贵族乌纳特里家的人！”
languages.original_text: "I have had the honour of knowing many Gapraks in the course of my long life, but I do not recall you. You must be of the younger branch, my dear? You most surely have the severity of Subord Shab in you. But then those eyes... Kalivin branch? No, no, I'm losing my touch — you are decidedly Noblis Minoris Uratli!"

traits.locale_text: “在我漫长的一生中，有幸结识过许多贾帕克家的人，但我不记得有你。你一定是旁支的吧，亲爱的？你身上确实有苏伯德·沙巴那一脉的冷峻气质。可这双眼睛……卡利文一脉的？不对，不对，我真是老糊涂了，你分明就是小贵族乌纳特里家的人！”

languages.text: « J'ai eu l'honneur de connaître de nombreux Gaprak au cours de ma longue vie, mais je n'ai aucun souvenir de vous. J'imagine que vous êtes {mf|issu|issue} de la branche la plus jeune, très {mf|cher|chère} ? Vous avez assurément l'allure sévère des Subord Shab, mais vos yeux... La branche Kalivin ? Non, non, qu'est-ce que je raconte... Vous êtes indéniablement de la Noblis Minoris Uratli ! »
languages.original_text: "I have had the honour of knowing many Gapraks in the course of my long life, but I do not recall you. You must be of the younger branch, my dear? You most surely have the severity of Subord Shab in you. But then those eyes... Kalivin branch? No, no, I'm losing my touch — you are decidedly Noblis Minoris Uratli!"

traits.locale_text: « J'ai eu l'honneur de connaître de nombreux Gaprak au cours de ma longue vie, mais je n'ai aucun souvenir de vous. J'imagine que vous êtes {mf|issu|issue} de la branche la plus jeune, très {mf|cher|chère} ? Vous avez assurément l'allure sévère des Subord Shab, mais vos yeux... La branche Kalivin ? Non, non, qu'est-ce que je raconte... Vous êtes indéniablement de la Noblis Minoris Uratli ! »

languages.text: "Uzun ömrümde pek çok Gaprak tanıma onuruna eriştim ama sizi hatırlamıyorum. Gençlerden misiniz? Sizde kesinlikle Ast Subord Shab ciddiyeti var. Fakat o gözler... Kalivin kolu olabilir mi? Yok, yeteneğimi kaybediyorum... Kesinlikle Noblis Minoris Uratli olmalı!"
languages.original_text: "I have had the honour of knowing many Gapraks in the course of my long life, but I do not recall you. You must be of the younger branch, my dear? You most surely have the severity of Subord Shab in you. But then those eyes... Kalivin branch? No, no, I'm losing my touch — you are decidedly Noblis Minoris Uratli!"

traits.locale_text: "Uzun ömrümde pek çok Gaprak tanıma onuruna eriştim ama sizi hatırlamıyorum. Gençlerden misiniz? Sizde kesinlikle Ast Subord Shab ciddiyeti var. Fakat o gözler... Kalivin kolu olabilir mi? Yok, yeteneğimi kaybediyorum... Kesinlikle Noblis Minoris Uratli olmalı!"

languages.text: «He tenido el honor de conocer a muchos Gaprak durante mi vida, pero a usted no le recuerdo. Debe de ser de una rama más joven, ¿verdad? Desde luego, tiene la severidad de Subord Shab, pero esos ojos... ¿de los Kalivin? No, no, estoy perdiendo mis dotes... ¡Desde luego es de la Nobilis Minoris, un{mf|o|a} de los Uratli!».
languages.original_text: "I have had the honour of knowing many Gapraks in the course of my long life, but I do not recall you. You must be of the younger branch, my dear? You most surely have the severity of Subord Shab in you. But then those eyes... Kalivin branch? No, no, I'm losing my touch — you are decidedly Noblis Minoris Uratli!"

traits.locale_text: «He tenido el honor de conocer a muchos Gaprak durante mi vida, pero a usted no le recuerdo. Debe de ser de una rama más joven, ¿verdad? Desde luego, tiene la severidad de Subord Shab, pero esos ojos... ¿de los Kalivin? No, no, estoy perdiendo mis dotes... ¡Desde luego es de la Nobilis Minoris, un{mf|o|a} de los Uratli!».

languages.text: "Ich hatte in meinem langen Leben die Ehre, viele Gaprak kennen zu lernen, aber an Euch erinnere ich mich nicht. Gehört Ihr einem jüngeren Zweig an, Schätzchen? Ihr habt die Ernsthaftigkeit der Subord Shab. Aber diese Augen ... Kalivin-Zweig? Nein, nein, ich lasse nach ... Ihr stammt gewiss von den Noblis Minoris Uratli ab!"
languages.original_text: "I have had the honour of knowing many Gapraks in the course of my long life, but I do not recall you. You must be of the younger branch, my dear? You most surely have the severity of Subord Shab in you. But then those eyes... Kalivin branch? No, no, I'm losing my touch — you are decidedly Noblis Minoris Uratli!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich hatte in meinem langen Leben die Ehre, viele Gaprak kennen zu lernen, aber an Euch erinnere ich mich nicht. Gehört Ihr einem jüngeren Zweig an, Schätzchen? Ihr habt die Ernsthaftigkeit der Subord Shab. Aber diese Augen ... Kalivin-Zweig? Nein, nein, ich lasse nach ... Ihr stammt gewiss von den Noblis Minoris Uratli ab!"

languages.text: 「長い人生の中で、多くのガプラクたちと知り合ったことが、私の栄誉です。しかし、あなたには記憶がありません。あなたは、きっと若いガプラクの末裔でしょう。あなたには、サブワード・シャブの厳しさを感じます。でも、あの目は…カリビン家の血筋？いいえ、いいえ、私の記憶が曖昧になってきました。あなたは、間違いなくノブリス・ミニリス・ウラティです！」
languages.original_text: "I have had the honour of knowing many Gapraks in the course of my long life, but I do not recall you. You must be of the younger branch, my dear? You most surely have the severity of Subord Shab in you. But then those eyes... Kalivin branch? No, no, I'm losing my touch — you are decidedly Noblis Minoris Uratli!"

traits.locale_text: 「長い人生の中で、多くのガプラクたちと知り合ったことが、私の栄誉です。しかし、あなたには記憶がありません。あなたは、きっと若いガプラクの末裔でしょう。あなたには、サブワード・シャブの厳しさを感じます。でも、あの目は…カリビン家の血筋？いいえ、いいえ、私の記憶が曖昧になってきました。あなたは、間違いなくノブリス・ミニリス・ウラティです！」
